solutions.title: Tutorial
solutions.content:
1431A - Selling Hamburgers
The main idea is that $$$m$$$ should be equal to one of the values $$$a_i$$$ (because if it is different from all of the $$$a_i$$$, then we can increase it by $$$1$$$, and the answer becomes greater). So, we need to iterate on the value of $$$m$$$ from the array $$$a_i$$$, and for every such value, calculate the answer. The solution can be implemented in $$$O(n^2)$$$ or in $$$O(n \log n)$$$.
Note that the values in the input and the output may be large, so you have to use $$$64$$$-bit data types to solve this problem.

solutions.title: Solution (elizarov)
solutions.content:
fun main
()
{
repeat
(
readLine
()!!.
toInt
())
{
val n
=
readLine
()!!.
toInt
()
val a
=
readLine
()!!.
split
(
" "
).
map
{
it
.
toLong
()
}
val answer
=
a
.
sortedDescending
().
withIndex
().
maxOf
{
(
it
.
index
+
1
)
*
it
.
value
}
println
(
answer
)
}
}
